sn22.116:1.1: At Sāvatthī … . Sitting to one side, that bhikkhu said to the Blessed One:
sn22.116:1.2: "Venerable, sir, it is said, ‘a speaker on the Dhamma, a speaker on the Dhamma.’ In what way, venerable sir, is one a speaker on the Dhamma? In what way is one practising in accordance with the Dhamma? In what way has one attained Nibbāna in this very life?"
sn22.116:1.3: The rest of this sutta is identical with the preceding one.
